creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
% cd /usr/doc
% git branch
* main
  patch-1
  patch-7
% grep -R "FreeBSD Daemon" .
./website/content/ru/publish.adoc:|image:../../gifs/daemon.gif[FreeBSD Daemon,width=80,height=76] a|
./website/content/es/publish.adoc:|image:../../../gifs/daemon.gif[FreeBSD Daemon,width=80,height=76] a|
./website/content/en/publish.adoc:|image:../gifs/daemon.gif[FreeBSD Daemon,width=80,height=76] a|
./website/content/nl/publish.adoc:|image:../../gifs/daemon.gif[FreeBSD Daemon,width=80,height=76] a|
% 

The alt text for this image should be BSD Daemon (not FreeBSD Daemon).
